verses.latin_vulgate: Vocavit autem Jacob filios suos, et ait eis : Congregamini, ut annuntiem quæ ventura sunt vobis in diebus novissimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֥א יַעֲקֹ֖ב אֶל־בָּנָ֑יו וַיֹּ֗אמֶר הֵאָֽסְפוּ֙ וְאַגִּ֣ידָה לָכֶ֔ם אֵ֛ת אֲשֶׁר־יִקְרָ֥א אֶתְכֶ֖ם בְּאַחֲרִ֥ית הַיָּמִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And Jacob called unto his sons, and said, Gather yourselves together, that I may tell you that which shall befall you in the last days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregamini, et audite, filii Jacob,  audite Israël patrem vestrum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִקָּבְצ֥וּ וְשִׁמְע֖וּ בְּנֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֑ב וְשִׁמְע֖וּ אֶל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל אֲבִיכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Gather yourselves together, and hear, ye sons of Jacob; and hearken unto Israel your father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ruben, primogenitus meus,  tu fortitudo mea, et principium doloris mei ;  prior in donis, major in imperio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְאוּבֵן֙ בְּכֹ֣רִי אַ֔תָּה כֹּחִ֖י וְרֵאשִׁ֣ית אוֹנִ֑י יֶ֥תֶר שְׂאֵ֖ת וְיֶ֥תֶר עָֽז׃
verses.king_james: Reuben, thou art my firstborn, my might, and the beginning of my strength, the excellency of dignity, and the excellency of power:

verses.latin_vulgate: Effusus es sicut aqua, non crescas : quia ascendisti cubile patris tui,  et maculasti stratum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פַּ֤חַז כַּמַּ֙יִם֙ אַל־תּוֹתַ֔ר כִּ֥י עָלִ֖יתָ מִשְׁכְּבֵ֣י אָבִ֑יךָ אָ֥ז חִלַּ֖לְתָּ יְצוּעִ֥י עָלָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Unstable as water, thou shalt not excel; because thou wentest up to thy father’s bed; then defiledst thou it: he went up to my couch.

verses.latin_vulgate: Simeon et Levi fratres  vasa iniquitatis bellantia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְע֥וֹן וְלֵוִ֖י אַחִ֑ים כְּלֵ֥י חָמָ֖ס מְכֵרֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Simeon and Levi are brethren; instruments of cruelty are in their habitations.

verses.latin_vulgate: In consilium eorum non veniat anima mea,  et in cœtu illorum non sit gloria mea :  quia in furore suo occiderunt virum,  et in voluntate sua suffoderunt murum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּסֹדָם֙ אַל־תָּבֹ֣א נַפְשִׁ֔י בִּקְהָלָ֖ם אַל־תֵּחַ֣ד כְּבֹדִ֑י כִּ֤י בְאַפָּם֙ הָ֣רְגוּ אִ֔ישׁ וּבִרְצֹנָ֖ם עִקְּרוּ־שֽׁוֹר׃
verses.king_james: O my soul, come not thou into their secret; unto their assembly, mine honour, be not thou united: for in their anger they slew a man, and in their selfwill they digged down a wall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Maledictus furor eorum, quia pertinax :  et indignatio eorum, quia dura :  dividam eos in Jacob,  et dispergam eos in Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָר֤וּר אַפָּם֙ כִּ֣י עָ֔ז וְעֶבְרָתָ֖ם כִּ֣י קָשָׁ֑תָה אֲחַלְּקֵ֣ם בְּיַעֲקֹ֔ב וַאֲפִיצֵ֖ם בְּיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Cursed be their anger, for it was fierce; and their wrath, for it was cruel: I will divide them in Jacob, and scatter them in Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juda, te laudabunt fratres tui :  manus tua in cervicibus inimicorum tuorum,  adorabunt te filii patris tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהוּדָ֗ה אַתָּה֙ יוֹד֣וּךָ אַחֶ֔יךָ יָדְךָ֖ בְּעֹ֣רֶף אֹיְבֶ֑יךָ יִשְׁתַּחֲו֥וּ לְךָ֖ בְּנֵ֥י אָבִֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Judah, thou art he whom thy brethren shall praise: thy hand shall be in the neck of thine enemies; thy father’s children shall bow down before thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Catulus leonis Juda :  ad prædam, fili mi, ascendisti :  requiescens accubuisti ut leo,  et quasi leæna : quis suscitabit eum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גּ֤וּר אַרְיֵה֙ יְהוּדָ֔ה מִטֶּ֖רֶף בְּנִ֣י עָלִ֑יתָ כָּרַ֨ע רָבַ֧ץ כְּאַרְיֵ֛ה וּכְלָבִ֖יא מִ֥י יְקִימֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: Judah is a lion’s whelp: from the prey, my son, thou art gone up: he stooped down, he couched as a lion, and as an old lion; who shall rouse him up?

verses.latin_vulgate: Non auferetur sceptrum de Juda,  et dux de femore ejus,  donec veniat qui mittendus est,  et ipse erit expectatio gentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־יָס֥וּר שֵׁ֙בֶט֙ מִֽיהוּדָ֔ה וּמְחֹקֵ֖ק מִבֵּ֣ין רַגְלָ֑יו עַ֚ד כִּֽי־יָבֹ֣א שִׁילֹ֔ה וְל֖וֹ יִקְּהַ֥ת עַמִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: The sceptre shall not depart from Judah, nor a lawgiver from between his feet, until Shiloh come; and unto him shall the gathering of the people be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ligans ad vineam pullum suum,  et ad vitem, o fili mi, asinam suam,  lavabit in vino stolam suam  et in sanguine uvæ pallium suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹסְרִ֤י לַגֶּ֙פֶן֙ עִירֹ֔ה וְלַשֹּׂרֵקָ֖ה בְּנִ֣י אֲתֹנ֑וֹ כִּבֵּ֤ס בַּיַּ֙יִן֙ לְבֻשׁ֔וֹ וּבְדַם־עֲנָבִ֖ים סוּתֹֽה׃
verses.king_james: Binding his foal unto the vine, and his ass’s colt unto the choice vine; he washed his garments in wine, and his clothes in the blood of grapes:

verses.latin_vulgate: Pulchriores sunt oculi ejus vino,  et dentes ejus lacte candidiores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַכְלִילִ֥י עֵינַ֖יִם מִיָּ֑יִן וּלְבֶן־שִׁנַּ֖יִם מֵחָלָֽב׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: His eyes shall be red with wine, and his teeth white with milk.

verses.latin_vulgate: Zabulon in littore maris habitabit,  et in statione navium  pertingens usque ad Sidonem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְבוּלֻ֕ן לְח֥וֹף יַמִּ֖ים יִשְׁכֹּ֑ן וְהוּא֙ לְח֣וֹף אֳנִיֹּ֔ת וְיַרְכָת֖וֹ עַל־צִידֹֽן׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Zebulun shall dwell at the haven of the sea; and he shall be for an haven of ships; and his border shall be unto Zidon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Issachar asinus fortis  accubans inter terminos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשָּׂשכָ֖ר חֲמֹ֣ר גָּ֑רֶם רֹבֵ֖ץ בֵּ֥ין הַֽמִּשְׁפְּתָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: Issachar is a strong ass couching down between two burdens:

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidit requiem, quod esset bona  et terram, quod optima :  et supposuit humerum suum ad portandum,  factusque est tributis serviens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤רְא מְנֻחָה֙ כִּ֣י ט֔וֹב וְאֶת־הָאָ֖רֶץ כִּ֣י נָעֵ֑מָה וַיֵּ֤ט שִׁכְמוֹ֙ לִסְבֹּ֔ל וַיְהִ֖י לְמַס־עֹבֵֽד׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he saw that rest was good, and the land that it was pleasant; and bowed his shoulder to bear, and became a servant unto tribute.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dan judicabit populum suum  sicut et alia tribus in Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דָּ֖ן יָדִ֣ין עַמּ֑וֹ כְּאַחַ֖ד שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: Dan shall judge his people, as one of the tribes of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat Dan coluber in via,  cerastes in semita,  mordens ungulas equi,  ut cadat ascensor ejus retro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִי־דָן֙ נָחָ֣שׁ עֲלֵי־דֶ֔רֶךְ שְׁפִיפֹ֖ן עֲלֵי־אֹ֑רַח הַנֹּשֵׁךְ֙ עִקְּבֵי־ס֔וּס וַיִּפֹּ֥ל רֹכְב֖וֹ אָחֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Dan shall be a serpent by the way, an adder in the path, that biteth the horse heels, so that his rider shall fall backward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salutare tuum expectabo, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִישׁוּעָֽתְךָ֖ קִוִּ֥יתִי יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: I have waited for thy salvation, O Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gad, accinctus præliabitur ante eum :  et ipse accingetur retrorsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גָּ֖ד גְּד֣וּד יְגוּדֶ֑נּוּ וְה֖וּא יָגֻ֥ד עָקֵֽב׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Gad, a troop shall overcome him: but he shall overcome at the last.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aser, pinguis panis ejus,  et præbebit delicias regibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵאָשֵׁ֖ר שְׁמֵנָ֣ה לַחְמ֑וֹ וְה֥וּא יִתֵּ֖ן מַֽעֲדַנֵּי־מֶֽלֶךְ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Out of Asher his bread shall be fat, and he shall yield royal dainties.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nephthali, cervus emissus,  et dans eloquia pulchritudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַפְתָּלִ֖י אַיָּלָ֣ה שְׁלֻחָ֑ה הַנֹּתֵ֖ן אִמְרֵי־שָֽׁפֶר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Naphtali is a hind let loose: he giveth goodly words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius accrescens Joseph, filius accrescens et decorus aspectu :  filiæ discurrerunt super murum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֤ן פֹּרָת֙ יוֹסֵ֔ף בֵּ֥ן פֹּרָ֖ת עֲלֵי־עָ֑יִן בָּנ֕וֹת צָעֲדָ֖ה עֲלֵי־שֽׁוּר׃
verses.king_james: Joseph is a fruitful bough, even a fruitful bough by a well; whose branches run over the wall:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed exasperaverunt eum et jurgati sunt,  invideruntque illi habentes jacula.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְמָרְרֻ֖הוּ וָרֹ֑בּוּ וַֽיִּשְׂטְמֻ֖הוּ בַּעֲלֵ֥י חִצִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: The archers have sorely grieved him, and shot at him, and hated him:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedit in forti arcus ejus,  et dissoluta sunt vincula brachiorum et manuum illius  per manus potentis Jacob :  inde pastor egressus est, lapis Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֤שֶׁב בְּאֵיתָן֙ קַשְׁתּ֔וֹ וַיָּפֹ֖זּוּ זְרֹעֵ֣י יָדָ֑יו מִידֵי֙ אֲבִ֣יר יַעֲקֹ֔ב מִשָּׁ֥ם רֹעֶ֖ה אֶ֥בֶן יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: But his bow abode in strength, and the arms of his hands were made strong by the hands of the mighty God of Jacob; (from thence is the shepherd, the stone of Israel:)

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus patris tui erit adjutor tuus,  et omnipotens benedicet tibi  benedictionibus cæli desuper, benedictionibus abyssi jacentis deorsum,  benedictionibus uberum et vulvæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵאֵ֨ל אָבִ֜יךָ וְיַעְזְרֶ֗ךָּ וְאֵ֤ת שַׁדַּי֙ וִיבָ֣רְכֶ֔ךָּ בִּרְכֹ֤ת שָׁמַ֙יִם֙ מֵעָ֔ל בִּרְכֹ֥ת תְּה֖וֹם רֹבֶ֣צֶת תָּ֑חַת בִּרְכֹ֥ת שָׁדַ֖יִם וָרָֽחַם׃
verses.king_james: Even by the God of thy father, who shall help thee; and by the Almighty, who shall bless thee with blessings of heaven above, blessings of the deep that lieth under, blessings of the breasts, and of the womb:

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictiones patris tui confortatæ sunt benedictionibus patrum ejus,  donec veniret desiderium collium æternorum :  fiant in capite Joseph,  et in vertice Nazaræi inter fratres suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּרְכֹ֣ת אָבִ֗יךָ גָּֽבְרוּ֙ עַל־בִּרְכֹ֣ת הוֹרַ֔י עַֽד־תַּאֲוַ֖ת גִּבְעֹ֣ת עוֹלָ֑ם תִּֽהְיֶ֙יןָ֙ לְרֹ֣אשׁ יוֹסֵ֔ף וּלְקׇדְקֹ֖ד נְזִ֥יר אֶחָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: The blessings of thy father have prevailed above the blessings of my progenitors unto the utmost bound of the everlasting hills: they shall be on the head of Joseph, and on the crown of the head of him that was separate from his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benjamin lupus rapax,  mane comedat prædam,  et vespere dividet spolia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּנְיָמִין֙ זְאֵ֣ב יִטְרָ֔ף בַּבֹּ֖קֶר יֹ֣אכַל עַ֑ד וְלָעֶ֖רֶב יְחַלֵּ֥ק שָׁלָֽל׃
verses.king_james: Benjamin shall ravin as a wolf: in the morning he shall devour the prey, and at night he shall divide the spoil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes hi in tribubus Israël duodecim : hæc locutus est eis pater suus, benedixitque singulis benedictionibus propriis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֛לֶּה שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל שְׁנֵ֣ים עָשָׂ֑ר וְ֠זֹ֠את אֲשֶׁר־דִּבֶּ֨ר לָהֶ֤ם אֲבִיהֶם֙ וַיְבָ֣רֶךְ אוֹתָ֔ם אִ֛ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֥ר כְּבִרְכָת֖וֹ בֵּרַ֥ךְ אֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: All these are the twelve tribes of Israel: and this is it that their father spake unto them, and blessed them; every one according to his blessing he blessed them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et præcepit eis, dicens : Ego congregor ad populum meum : sepelite me cum patribus meis in spelunca duplici quæ est in agro Ephron Hethæi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַ֣ו אוֹתָ֗ם וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֲלֵהֶם֙ אֲנִי֙ נֶאֱסָ֣ף אֶל־עַמִּ֔י קִבְר֥וּ אֹתִ֖י אֶל־אֲבֹתָ֑י אֶ֨ל־הַמְּעָרָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בִּשְׂדֵ֖ה עֶפְר֥וֹן הַֽחִתִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: And he charged them, and said unto them, I am to be gathered unto my people: bury me with my fathers in the cave that is in the field of Ephron the Hittite,

verses.latin_vulgate: contra Mambre in terra Chanaan, quam emit Abraham cum agro ab Ephron Hethæo in possessionem sepulchri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּמְּעָרָ֞ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר בִּשְׂדֵ֧ה הַמַּכְפֵּלָ֛ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר עַל־פְּנֵי־מַמְרֵ֖א בְּאֶ֣רֶץ כְּנָ֑עַן אֲשֶׁר֩ קָנָ֨ה אַבְרָהָ֜ם אֶת־הַשָּׂדֶ֗ה מֵאֵ֛ת עֶפְרֹ֥ן הַחִתִּ֖י לַאֲחֻזַּת־קָֽבֶר׃
verses.king_james: In the cave that is in the field of Machpelah, which is before Mamre, in the land of Canaan, which Abraham bought with the field of Ephron the Hittite for a possession of a buryingplace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi sepelierunt eum, et Saram uxorem ejus : ibi sepultus est Isaac cum Rebecca conjuge sua : ibi et Lia condita jacet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֣מָּה קָֽבְר֞וּ אֶת־אַבְרָהָ֗ם וְאֵת֙ שָׂרָ֣ה אִשְׁתּ֔וֹ שָׁ֚מָּה קָבְר֣וּ אֶת־יִצְחָ֔ק וְאֵ֖ת רִבְקָ֣ה אִשְׁתּ֑וֹ וְשָׁ֥מָּה קָבַ֖רְתִּי אֶת־לֵאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: There they buried Abraham and Sarah his wife; there they buried Isaac and Rebekah his wife; and there I buried Leah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Finitisque mandatis quibus filios instruebat, collegit pedes suos super lectulum, et obiit : appositusque est ad populum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִקְנֵ֧ה הַשָּׂדֶ֛ה וְהַמְּעָרָ֥ה אֲשֶׁר־בּ֖וֹ מֵאֵ֥ת בְּנֵי־חֵֽת׃
verses.king_james: The purchase of the field and of the cave that is therein was from the children of Heth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Finitisque mandatis quibus filios instruebat, collegit pedes suos super lectulum, et obiit : appositusque est ad populum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַ֤ל יַעֲקֹב֙ לְצַוֺּ֣ת אֶת־בָּנָ֔יו וַיֶּאֱסֹ֥ף רַגְלָ֖יו אֶל־הַמִּטָּ֑ה וַיִּגְוַ֖ע וַיֵּאָ֥סֶף אֶל־עַמָּֽיו׃
verses.king_james: And when Jacob had made an end of commanding his sons, he gathered up his feet into the bed, and yielded up the ghost, and was gathered unto his people.
